raw_cv_text:
Émilienne Al Wazzan
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: emilienne.wazzan@outlook.com | LinkedIn: émilienne-al wazzan | GitHub: ÉmilienneAl Wazzan |
https://emilienne-wazzan.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | MEng Computer Science 2019-2023
Developed distributed systems capstone project handling 50K+ concurrent requests with 99.9% uptime using gRPC and
Kubernetes
Led systems programming society with 120+ members, organizing 8 technical workshops on API design patterns
Imperial College London | BSc Computer Science (Exchange Year) 2021-2022
Completed advanced algorithms and cloud computing specialization with distinction
Contributed to 3 peer-reviewed papers on microservices architecture optimization
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Senior API Engineer 2023-Present
Architected and deployed billing API v3 handling $2.8B in monthly transaction volume across 180+ countries, reducing
latency by 38% through query optimization and caching strategies
Led cross-functional team of 4 engineers to implement rate limiting system that decreased API abuse incidents by 92%
while maintaining 99.95% availability for legitimate requests
Refactored legacy webhook delivery system, increasing reliability from 97.2% to 99.98% and reducing failure
notifications by 65% through exponential backoff and circuit breaker patterns
Cloudflare | API Engineer II 2021-2023
Built RESTful API gateway processing 45TB of DNS and security logs daily, optimizing database queries to reduce
response times by 44% and server costs by $220K annually
Designed comprehensive API documentation and SDK generation framework adopted by 150+ enterprise customers,
reducing integration time by 73% and support tickets by 58%
Implemented distributed tracing and monitoring for 12 microservices using OpenTelemetry, enabling 21% faster incident
resolution and 84% reduction in API error rates
HashiCorp | API Engineer 2020-2021
Developed gRPC-based configuration API supporting 40+ enterprise clients with 99.99% SLA, enabling infrastructure-as-
code workflows for 500+ daily active users
Implemented automated API versioning and backward compatibility framework reducing schema migration issues by
91% and enabling 2-week release cycles instead of monthly
Created comprehensive integration test suite covering 280+ API endpoints, increasing code coverage from 52% to 87%
and catching 34 critical bugs before production
PROJECTS
AsyncIO Event Router | Python, FastAPI, Redis, PostgreSQL, Docker 2023-Present
Open-source event streaming router handling 100K events/second with <50ms latency, achieving 2.3K GitHub stars and
adopted by 18 production companies
Reduced memory footprint by 56% through intelligent batching and implemented persistent retry logic decreasing
message loss from 0.3% to 0.001%
GraphQL-to-REST API Transpiler | TypeScript, Node.js, GraphQL, Jest, AWS Lambda 2022-2023
Built open-source tool enabling automatic conversion of GraphQL queries to optimized REST endpoints, reducing API
calls by 67% for 25+ enterprise adopters
Published 3 technical articles reaching 12K developers, establishing thought leadership and driving 340+ GitHub
contributions from community
Rate Limiter as a Service | Go, Redis Cluster, Protocol Buffers, gRPC, Prometheus 2021-2022
Engineered distributed rate limiting microservice with <1ms p99 latency across multi-region deployments, handling 2.1M
requests/second with zero data loss
Reduced infrastructure costs by 48% through token bucket optimization and increased customer adoption by 156%
through simplified SDK interface
API Gateway Performance Analyzer | Rust, Tokio, InfluxDB, Grafana, WASM 2020-2021
Developed real-time API performance profiler analyzing 500K+ requests daily, identifying bottlenecks and
recommending optimizations saving customers 31% in latency
Achieved 89% adoption rate among Stripe partners through automated insights and reduced customer support burden by
42 weekly hours
EXTRACURRICULAR
API Design Conference (APIDays) | Conference Speaker & Workshop Facilitator 2022-Present
Delivered keynote on 'Scaling APIs to Billions of Requests' reaching 2,300+ attendees and generating 145K video views,
establishing expertise in high-throughput systems
Facilitated 6 workshops on gRPC, REST best practices, and API security with 18% attendee satisfaction rating and
sponsorship partnerships worth €85K
London DevOps & Cloud Native Community | Technical Lead & Open Source Mentor 2020-Present
Mentored 12 junior engineers contributing to distributed systems projects, resulting in 8 promotions and 3 successful
open-source project launches
Organized monthly meetups attracting 200+ engineers, curated technical content on microservices and Kubernetes,
increasing community membership by 340%
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, Go, TypeScript/Node.js, Java, Rust, SQL, Bash
Technologies – REST APIs, gRPC, GraphQL, Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Protocol Buffers, OAuth
2.0, JWT, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (Lambda, RDS, EC2), GCP, Microservices Architecture
Tools – Git, GitHub, GitLab, JIRA, Datadog, New Relic, Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Postman, Kong,
Swagger/OpenAPI, Apache Airflow, Jenkins, GitHub Actions
name: Émilienne Al Wazzan

projects.name: GraphQL-to-REST API Transpiler
projects.subtitle: TypeScript, Node.js, GraphQL, Jest, AWS Lambda

projects.name: Rate Limiter as a Service
projects.subtitle: Go, Redis Cluster, Protocol Buffers, gRPC, Prometheus
